title: Barely Default Sound Pack
description: A sound resource pack to accompany the Barely Default Data Pack
body:
# Barely Default Sound Pack
A resource pack that provides sounds necessary to hear while playing with the Barely Default resource pack and data pack.

Missing sounds to mobs, bosses and items like the necromancer staves? This resource pack is your answer!
